_doc: Frozen characterization fixture for src.saeima motif helpers. Generated 2026-04-29 by capturing real outputs of resolve_bill_from_motif, _reading_from_motif, _motif_to_topic on representative motifs sampled from saeima_votes table. DO NOT hand-edit values — regenerate via scripts/regen_saeima_chars.py if observed behavior intentionally changes.
